data.reasoning: Both audit models skipped PKGBUILD (the critical build script) by misclassifying it as binary, preventing any meaningful security analysis. No files were reviewed.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped entirely due to erroneous binary detection
No review of install hooks, build scripts, or source files with execution risk
false_negatives: All potential risks (malicious build commands, unsafe install hooks, etc.) were missed due to PKGBUILD skip
re_audit_focus: Source files referenced in build/package functions
learnings: Fix binary detection heuristics: PKGBUILD must never be skipped as 'binary'
Prioritize PKGBUILD/.install files even if initial read fails
Add fallback mechanism (e.g., hex inspection) for suspected binary files
Audit must fail explicitly if PKGBUILD can't be read
